query:
INSERT INTO revenue_groups (groupId, name, type, customerExternalId, customerName, totalRevenue, autoDetected)
SELECT 
  s.revenueGroupId AS groupId,
  CONCAT(s.customerName, ' - Voice Pack') AS name,
  'voice_pack' AS type,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS totalRevenue,
  1 AS autoDetected
FROM services s
WHERE s.revenueGroupId IS NOT NULL AND s.revenueGroupId <> ''
GROUP BY s.revenueGroupId, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE totalRevenue = VALUES(totalRevenue);

SELECT 
  s.revenueGroupId AS groupId,
  CONCAT(s.customerName, ' - Voice Pack') AS name,
  'voice_pack' AS type,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS totalRevenue,
  1 AS autoDetected
FROM services s
WHERE s.revenueGroupId IS NOT NULL AND s.revenueGroupId <> ''
